# [LinuxOS] init-company.el

```default
;;; init-company.el --- Company-mode configuration (Linux optimized)

(use-package company
  :hook ((after-init . global-company-mode)
         (LaTeX-mode . company-mode)
         (org-mode . company-mode)
         (prog-mode . company-mode))

  :config
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------
  ;; Core performance tuning (important on Linux large files)
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------

  (setq company-idle-delay 0.2
        company-minimum-prefix-length 2
        company-tooltip-align-annotations t
        company-dabbrev-downcase nil
        company-require-match nil
        company-selection-wrap-around t)

  ;; Faster completion in large projects (Org-roam / LaTeX / Python)
  (setq company-dabbrev-ignore-case t)

  ;; -------------------------------------------------------
  ;; Backends (important for academic workflow)
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------

  (setq company-backends
        '((company-capf
           company-files
           company-keywords
           company-dabbrev)))

  ;; -------------------------------------------------------
  ;; UI improvements (Linux GUI/terminal friendly)
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------

  (when (display-graphic-p)
    (setq company-tooltip-limit 15)))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Optional: Better UI (recommended for Linux GUI users)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package company-box
  :hook (company-mode . company-box-mode)
  :if (display-graphic-p)
  :config
  (setq company-box-doc-delay 0.3))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; LaTeX-aware completion enhancement (AUCTeX integration)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(with-eval-after-load 'tex
  (setq company-backends
        (append '((company-auctex-labels
                   company-auctex-bibs))
                company-backends)))

(provide 'init-company)
;;; init-company.el ends here
```
